strategy_summary: The body tissue of the red bat can tolerate being frozen. “The American red bat ( Lasiurus borealis ) can survive even if its body tissues freeze when the outside temperature falls as low as 23°F (-5°C).” (Shuker 2001:101)
mechanism:
The body tissue of the red bat can tolerate being frozen.

“The American red bat ( Lasiurus borealis ) can survive even if its body tissues freeze when the outside temperature falls as low as 23°F (-5°C).” (Shuker 2001:101)
